schema_source: INFORMATION_SCHEMA extract from Ascend Databricks mirror of PFx/DAU database (ppco catalog)
schema_purpose: Authoritative destination schema for AI-assisted data migration. Replaces cch_axcess_target_schema_v2.json. All 90 base tables with 2,074 fields from the actual PFx database.
pipeline_position: Source (PE) → THIS SCHEMA (PFx) → Migration Utility → CCH Axcess

field_definition_spec.data_type: Authoritative data type from PFx database
field_definition_spec.is_nullable: Whether the field allows NULL values
field_definition_spec.character_maximum_length: Max character length for string fields
field_definition_spec.description: Semantic purpose — used by AI during field matching
field_definition_spec.transformation_notes: Mechanical rules — used by AI during code generation
field_definition_spec.common_source_names: Aliases the AI watches for during source schema discovery

tier_definitions.1: Core migration targets — directly addressed by Tim's 5 conversion scripts (Clients, Contacts, Jobs, AR, WIP). Must be populated for a basic migration.
tier_definitions.2: Entity-type extensions — required for complete client records based on entity type (Individual, Corporation, Partnership, etc.). Population depends on entity classification.
tier_definitions.3: Reference/setup tables — must exist before migration data (staff, service codes, firm config). Typically populated once during initial Axcess setup, not per-acquisition.
tier_definitions.4: Extended/secondary tables — detail tables, audit logs, custom fields, workflow tracking. May be populated for comprehensive migrations or can be deferred.
